name: Arun Selvamani
securitysummary: Development and implementation of cutting-edge technologies to fortify container environments and protect them from potential threats. My expertise lies in building robust security frameworks, identifying vulnerabilities, and implementing measures to ensure the integrity and confidentiality of containerized applications.  Helping customers adhere to FedRamp , GDPR and PCI standards. Passionate about AI and used Deep Learning for Malware detections and to find anomalies with runtime detection .  I successfully led the development and implementation of API Gateway at Qualys.Led the development and implementation of this critical project from inception to completion. Single-handedly added a wide range of essential features significantly enhancing its functionality and value for Qualys and its clients.

Attributes include the ability to view a business both strategically and tactically and derive lasting designs. Patience and understanding as regards to the mentoring of and guidance for team members especially in the more abstract principles of good design.

Labman2 is an inventory management tool used by Customer Proof of Concept labs. Application provides Inventory management and Reservation capabilities for Customer visits. It’s also used for Entering RMA, Demo Depot orders and Loaners between Labs. Managers use the application to generate reports about Device utilization, Booking Costs etc. 
Autonomously designed and developed the application from Scratch. Responsibilities included setting up database, web environment and LDAP.  UI Prototyping using Velocity templates and Ajax. Developing handled module for effectively entering lab inventory. Implemented JFreechart for showcasing graphs and rich ui reports. Successful implementation at CPOC- San Jose, led to the toll out of application across multiple labs at Cisco.
